div.h1: Ring Buffer Memory Layout (Architecture: ARMv8-A / M1)

div.p: padding[56] Offset: 0x08 | Size: 56B Prevents head/tail false sharing
HeaderOffset = 0x00 SlotArrayOffset = 0x100 (256B) Slot(i)_Addr = Base + 0x100 + (i * slot_size) Slots must be cache-line aligned (S % 64 == 0) | { near: top-left }

legend: { label: |md ### Memory Regions - 🟣 Header Metadata: 256B control block - 🟠 Atomic Pointers: head/tail cursors - 🟢 Static Config: Read-only after init - 🔵 Dynamic State: Coordination fields - ⬜ Padding: Avoids L1 false sharing - 🩵 Payloads: Raw message slots

ul.li: head (CL0) and tail (CL1) occupy distinct cache lines.
This prevents False Sharing where Producer/Consumer CPUs fight for ownership of the same line.
Inter-process: Map with shm_open and mmap

div.p: tail _Atomic uint64_t Offset: 0x40 | Size: 8B Consumer Read Cursor
Offset: 0x100 Data: [64 - 1024 bytes] Primary Message Buffer
